'''''Droids'' 6''' is the sixth issue of the [[Star Wars: Droids (1986)|''Star Wars Droids'']] series of comics. It was published [[November 18]], [[1986]]<ref name="Marvel Age" /> with a cover date of [[February]] [[1987]].
